mechanicComponents.needTwoStudents: At least 2 active students are needed.

random.name: Pure random
random.desc: Everyone has exactly the same probability of being chosen
random.longDesc: Completely random selection. No weighting, no bias. Every active student has exactly the same chance of being selected.

weighted.name: Weighted random
weighted.desc: Students who haven't participated in a while have higher probability
weighted.longDesc: Each intervention reduces the student's weight. Forgotten students increase their probability automatically. Never fully predictable, but much fairer than pure chance.

fair.name: Total fairness
fair.desc: Tries to give everyone the same number of participations
fair.longDesc: Orders students by participation count. Randomly selects from those who have participated the least. Ideal for oral assessments where everyone should participate equally.

noRepeat.name: Never repeated
noRepeat.desc: Never selects the same student twice in a row
noRepeat.longDesc: Guarantees that the same student is never repeated in two consecutive selections. If there is only one active student, that one is selected.

forgotten.name: The forgotten
forgotten.desc: Always picks whoever has gone the longest without participating
forgotten.longDesc: Orders students by time since their last intervention. Always selects the one who has gone the longest without participating. Perfect for ensuring nobody is left out.

shy.name: The shy
shy.desc: Students with fewer participations have much higher probability
shy.longDesc: Strongly favors students who have participated the least. Those who have already participated a lot see their probability drastically reduced. Ideal for encouraging the quieter ones to participate.

brave.name: The brave
brave.desc: Favors those who participate the most. Great for debates
brave.longDesc: The opposite of "The shy". Favors students who participate the most. Useful for fast-paced debates or when you want to keep a lively rhythm in class.

adaptiveRoulette.name: Adaptive roulette
adaptiveRoulette.desc: Sectors change size: students who haven't participated in a while take up more space on the wheel
adaptiveRoulette.longDesc: Visually spectacular. The wheel shows sectors of size proportional to each student's probability. Forgotten students take up more space. Those who just participated, less. A visual experience that communicates fairness.

chain.name: Chain
chain.desc: The next pick is whoever has gone the longest without participating
chain.longDesc: Each selection chains into the next one. After selecting a student, the next one will be the one who has gone the longest without participating. Creates a sense of continuous and fair flow.

byGroup.name: Group balance
byGroup.desc: First picks the group, then the student within the group
byGroup.longDesc: Distributes participation among groups equitably. First selects the group with the fewest accumulated participations, then picks a student within that group. Ideal for classes with work groups.

hotBall.name: Hot ball
hotBall.desc: Tendency to pick students near the last selected one
hotBall.longDesc: Creates a sense of continuity. When a student is selected, nearby students on the list increase their probability. Ideal for keeping focus on one area of the classroom.

surprise.name: Surprise effect
surprise.desc: Uses a different random strategy each time
surprise.longDesc: Keep the uncertainty. Every time you press, a random strategy is selected from all available ones. Not even the teacher knows which method will be used. Ideal for keeping attention.

customMix.name: Custom mix
customMix.desc: Combine weights with sliders: chance, compensation, groups...
customMix.longDesc: The teacher manually adjusts the importance of each factor using sliders. Combines pure chance, participation compensation, group equity, and time since last participation.

tournament.name: Tournament mode
tournament.desc: Everyone starts. Each correct answer eliminates the student. Last one wins
tournament.longDesc: Competition mode. All students start active. Each time a student is selected, they are eliminated from the tournament. The last one standing wins. Ideal for competitive reviews.

smartQueue.name: Smart queue
smartQueue.desc: Generates a queue balancing participations, groups, and history
smartQueue.longDesc: Creates a participation queue that takes into account: who has participated the least, balanced groups, and no repeats near each other. The queue regenerates automatically when finished.

balancedTeams.name: Balanced teams
balancedTeams.desc: Evenly distributes participations, groups, and colors across all teams
balancedTeams.longDesc: Generates teams trying to balance: the number of participants, existing groups, participation history, and colors. Ideal for group work.

captain.name: Captain
captain.desc: Picks a captain and creates teams around them
captain.longDesc: First selects a random captain. Then the captain picks teammates alternating turns (simulated automatically) to form balanced teams.

examMode.name: Exam mode
examMode.desc: Guarantees everyone is selected once before anyone repeats
examMode.longDesc: Forced round-robin. The application guarantees that all active students are selected exactly once before anyone repeats. Ideal for oral assessments.
